title: Embodied AI Project Dashboard

summary.focus: Frame the whole portfolio as one loop: real-robot infra collects and validates data; UMI / layered / HOI projects structure it; simulator and PoD projects turn it into robot tasks, evaluation, and physical outputs.
summary.progress: ARX infra was completed today; ready hardware baseline is recorded; UMI annotation panel and Gemini frame test are done; UMI base-model / codebase tests, Self-Improving Agents, and Robotics + 3D Printing remain active.
summary.blockers: Cross-device sync, calibration, and data schema; Franka + Wuji integration; UMI base-model route and evaluation set; LeHome / RoboLab unification; CAD-to-printer handoff; scope boundaries for survey tracks.
summary.next: Finish the Franka + Wuji minimal run, prepare the UMI test set for Haoyu, run TI2V / AI2V inference, write layered-WM notes, define the simulator task / asset interface, and scope the PoD prototype.

rules: Humans read dashboard/index.html; agents read dashboard/state/*.json.
Workers must not edit dashboard/index.html unless the task explicitly asks for UI work.
Workers may update only their own dashboard/state/agents/{agent_id}.json and dashboard/state/runs/{run_id}.json.
The conductor is the only owner for dashboard/state/tasks.json and dashboard/state/portfolio.json.
Experimental claims must cite a run_id with a verified run state file.
